data.summary: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement for consent/privacy-aware eligibility gating.
data.assessment: The exploratory step requires validation of the requirement 'Consent/privacy-aware eligibility gating'. However, the evidence provided does not include any concrete API reads or checks that confirm this requirement is satisfied. The linked use case mentions the need for this functionality but lacks specific evidence to demonstrate its implementation or operational status, leading to an inconclusive verdict.
gaps: No evidence of consent/privacy-aware eligibility gating being implemented or validated.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
